local_contract_evidence.cli_build_command: python -m heitang_kb_forge.cli build-prompt-asset-library --skill-suite artifacts/audits/latest/skill_generation_20260612_121206/skill_suite --output artifacts/audits/section_5/skill_prompt_generator_prompt_asset_library/prompt_asset_library --library-name "HeiTang Skill Factory Prompt Assets"

why_real_integration: A local Prompt Asset Library enhancer is implemented and exercised against an existing Skill Suite artifact.
The run produced non-empty prompt cards, a manifest, a Skill Factory enhancement report, and a validation report.
The integration improves prompt asset governance without replacing P2.2 Skill Factory or requiring LLM/API access.
boundaries: real_integration means local prompt asset library enhancement only.
No skill-prompt-generator runtime, code, prompt files, or repository contents are bundled.
License review remains pending for any future copying, vendoring, or redistribution of external repository content.
UI may show status and preview evidence only; full UI workflow remains a later campaign.
remaining_gap: Section 5 items 5.7 through 5.13, external Skill learning E2E, owned Skill generation, multi-agent workflow, full UI workflow, Core Bridge, configuration, Full Gate, EXE, and release remain incomplete.
